titleZh: 上市公司重大资产重组管理办法（2008年制定）
titleEn: Administrative Measures for Major Asset Reorganizations of Listed Companies (2008 Text)
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 上市公司重大资产重组规则体系的起点文本，确立重大资产重组认定、审核和信息披露的基本框架。
summaryEn: The starting text of the listed-company major-asset-reorganization regime, establishing the basic framework for transaction qualification, review, and disclosure.
applicablePeriodZh: 2008年5月18日起施行，至 2014 年重大修订文本发布前构成并购重组基础规章。
applicablePeriodEn: Effective from May 18, 2008, and served as the foundational M&A rule until the 2014 revision.
